hooks.name: Aikido Security Scan After SonarQube
hooks.description: Runs an Aikido security scan after SonarQube code review completes and before the final build. Ensures no SAST vulnerabilities, secrets, or IaC misconfigurations are present. Pipeline order: write → test → code review (SonarQube) → security scan (Aikido) → build → deploy.

action.prompt: A SonarQube scan just completed. Now run an Aikido security scan on all files that were modified in this session. Activate the aikido-security-scan power and use aikido_full_scan. If any critical or high severity issues are found, fix them before proceeding to build. Log the scan results by calling POST /api/security-scans with the scan summary (timestamp, files_scanned, issues_found, severity_breakdown, status). Do NOT proceed to build if critical security issues remain unfixed.
